subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the Light of Guidance! Behold the grace and bounty of the Peerless Lord, that notwithstanding that error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی فضل و عنایت حضرت بیچون را ملاحظه نما که با وجود آن خطا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
